activityLog.details: Pulled board-state.json from repo. Checked all task states. No jackie-execute tasks found. In-progress: virtus-5, crown-3, crown-4. Done: virtus-1, virtus-2. Board state unchanged.

activityLog.details: Pulled board-state.json from repo. Checked all task states. No jackie-execute tasks found. In-progress: virtus-5, crown-3, crown-4. Done: virtus-1, virtus-2. Board state unchanged.

activityLog.details: Pulled board-state.json from repo. Checked all task states. No jackie-execute tasks found. In-progress: virtus-5, crown-3, crown-4. Board state unchanged.

activityLog.summary: Activity Log tab added to Ops Dashboard
activityLog.details: New 📜 Activity Log tab deployed. Shows Jackie's status reports, cron run results, and task execution history. Reads from board-state.json activityLog array. Jackie's cron appends new entries on each run.

activityLog.summary: Cron run complete. Board state synced.
activityLog.details: Pulled board-state.json from repo. Checked all boards. No new Jackie Execute tasks queued. Board state up to date.

activityLog.summary: Cron run complete. Board state synced.
activityLog.details: Pulled board-state.json from repo. Checked all boards. Reclaimed: 10 todo tasks, 0 execute tasks. All other boards unchanged.

activityLog.summary: Hourly cron created for Jackie Ops Check
activityLog.details: Cron job created on Mac Studio: runs every hour, pulls board-state.json from GitHub repo, checks for Jackie Execute tasks, syncs state. First successful run confirmed.

activityLog.summary: Git-based sync deployed — board-state.json is now source of truth
activityLog.details: Migrated from GitHub Gist to full git repo (goodneonsigns-sketch/site-performance-board). board-state.json committed to main branch. Dashboard reads/writes via GitHub Contents API. Dana clicks Sync to pull latest. Jackie's cron pushes state on every run.

activityLog.summary: Ops board persistence upgraded — memory index + per-board sync
activityLog.details: Added memory index builder (build-memory-index.py). Per-board Sync buttons replace single global sync. Jackie responses now persisted in board-state.json. Cron job reads and writes to same file. Dashboard auto-pulls on load.

activityLog.summary: Virtus Realty: Compare + Showing Request system deployed
activityLog.details: Added property compare mode (up to 3 properties side-by-side), Showing Request form with calendar picker, confirmation modal, and toast notifications. All wired into existing property detail modal flow.

activityLog.summary: Virtus Realty: Property detail page + phone number update
activityLog.details: Full property detail page deployed with high-res photo gallery, amenities grid, neighborhood info, mortgage calculator, and agent contact card. Phone number updated to (305) 555-0192. Agent card links to Showing Request modal.

activityLog.summary: Virtus Realty: Team page + OG image deployed
activityLog.details: Added /team page with agent profiles, headshots, bios, and contact cards. OG image created (1200×630, Navy+Gold branding) for social sharing. Meta tags updated across all pages.

activityLog.summary: Virtus Realty: Logo added across all pages
activityLog.details: Virtus Realty SVG logo created and added to header, footer, and OG image. Navy blue (#1B2A4A) and gold (#C9A84C) brand colors applied site-wide. Logo responsive on mobile.

activityLog.summary: Virtus Realty: Navy + Gold rebrand deployed
activityLog.details: Complete visual rebrand from default theme to Navy (#1B2A4A) + Gold (#C9A84C) luxury palette. Updated: hero section, navigation, property cards, footer, CTA buttons, and filter panel. Dark luxury feel matching brand identity.

activityLog.summary: Virtus Realty: Rich filter UI deployed (1233 lines)
activityLog.details: Full property search filter system deployed: price range slider, beds/baths selectors, property type checkboxes (Single Family, Condo, Townhouse, Villa, Waterfront), amenities filter (Pool, Gym, Ocean View, etc.), sort options, active filter chips, and reset button. 1233-line filter UI, fully responsive.

activityLog.summary: Hourly board check — no tasks queued
activityLog.details: No jackie-execute tasks found. taskPrompts empty. lexTasks empty. Board has 5 tracked tasks: virtus-1 (done), virtus-2 (done), virtus-5 (in-progress), crown-3 (in-progress), crown-4 (in-progress). Quiet Saturday.

_readme: Single source of truth for ops dashboard. Dana commits on every state change. Jackie's cron reads this, executes tasks, writes responses back, then git push. Dana clicks Sync to pull latest.
